calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/17/26. (No earlier availability.) No response to issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 4/20/26. An ex parte petition must be filed to request that notice be dispensed with to a person whose whereabouts are unknown even after diligent search. If the decedent's father's death has never been confirmed, a petition to determine fact of death should be filed.
New deadline for providing courtesy copies of any responsive papers to the assigned examiner is 8/3/26.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
